creator: mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I believe this is the commit that changed the values in the ACPI SPCR table:

https://github.com/qemu/qemu/commit/41f7b58b634ec3b60ae874375d2bbb61d790971e

Had to skip back a previous commit to see the blame for it via their master branch:
git blame 7dd0b070fa0^ -- hw/arm/virt-acpi-build.c
